turns.content:
Download the entire GSD repository from https://github.com/open-gsd/get-shit-done-redux/tree/next using repomix.

Steps:
1. Run: `repomix-pack-remote --remote https://github.com/open-gsd/get-shit-done-redux/tree/next --style xml --topFilesLength 10`
2. Save the output to `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/research/gsd-repo-packed.xml`
3. If repomix-pack-remote is not available, use: `repomix_pack_codebase` with remote parameter

IMPORTANT: Include ALL subdirectories EXCEPT language-specific ones (zh, ja, ko, etc.)

Report back the output file path and size when done.
The pack completed but included 1558 files (3.1M tokens). The user asked to exclude language-specific directories (zh, ja, ko). Let me re-run with proper ignore patterns.
The ignore patterns didn't reduce the count. Let me check the actual language directory structure and fix this.
No language-specific directories exist in the repo. Copying the file to the target path now.

Done.

**Output:** `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/research/gsd-repo-packed.xml`

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| File size | 12.7 MB (12,729,719 bytes) |
| Total files | 1,558 |
| Total tokens | ~3.17M |
| Total lines | 314,647 |
| Top file | `bin/install.js` (479K chars) |

No language-specific directories were found in the repo, so all contents are included.
